title: Rabbits in Forest
hints: Count how many rabbits reported each answer x. Each group of size x+1 can accommodate at most x+1 such reports.
For a specific answer x, if k rabbits reported it, you need ceil(k / (x+1)) groups of that color.
The total minimum rabbits is the sum over all distinct answers x of ceil(count[x] / (x+1)) * (x+1).
